name: Easy Chicken Pastry Bites
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the 8 crescent roll triangles.
2. Mix the sauce and the chicken, dividing the mixture equally among the triangles.
3. Pinch closed the triangles so that the chicken is completely surrounded.
4. Bake for 20 minutes at 375°F.
Easy and delicious!
The Chef's Comments:
"Today we made a nice, simple but delicious lunch. Cooking time was about 20 minutes, but the prep time was minimal. And we managed to put it together amid the clutter of a kitchen still messed-up from a Christmas Eve party." - Lisa
From: Lisa
